title: Rollback V5.4 Control Plane Bootstrap

scope.technical_rollback_allowed_when: Control Plane has not yet carried business release evidence.
scope.evidence_retention_required_when: Control Plane has carried release evidence.

steps: Confirm whether control_plane.gate_results, control_plane.release_manifests, control_plane.runtime_invariant_checks, and control_plane.shadow_compare_reports contain only bootstrap evidence.
If Control Plane has not yet carried business release evidence, a reviewed technical rollback may drop shadow_runtime first and then control_plane.
If Control Plane has carried release evidence, do not directly drop either schema; migrate or archive the evidence first, then apply a reviewed compensating migration.
Record the rollback decision, operator, affected schemas, and evidence retention decision in the release audit trail.
validation_steps: Run control-plane-migration and control-plane-schema-verify after rollback or compensation.
Confirm no business release evidence was lost.
Confirm official runtime projectors still do not read shadow_runtime.
Confirm release-manifest-validate fails closed if the generated GateResult or manifest is missing.
